proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher numeric values of `feature_041` are associated with higher mean `pfs_months`; each one-unit increase in `feature_041` increases `pfs_months`.

analyses.method: Univariate OLS regression of pfs_months on feature_041.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_041` had a strong positive univariate association with `pfs_months`: +0.1699 months per one-unit increase (mean feature_041 64.99, range 30-90).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher ordinal values of `feature_036` are associated with lower mean `pfs_months`; each one-unit increase in `feature_036` decreases `pfs_months`.

analyses.method: Univariate OLS regression of pfs_months on feature_036.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_036` was strongly adverse: -1.0993 months per one-unit increase, with p<1e-300.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_001=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_001=0`.

analyses.method: Univariate two-group mean comparison/OLS coefficient for feature_001.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_001=1` was associated with 1.4375 fewer months of PFS than `feature_001=0` (p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_042=1` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_042=0`.

analyses.method: Univariate two-group mean comparison/OLS coefficient for feature_042.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_042=1` was associated with 0.9207 fewer months of PFS than `feature_042=0` (p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `feature_015="squamous"` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_015="adenocarcinoma"`.

analyses.method: Univariate two-group comparison of feature_015 levels.
analyses.result_summary: Mean PFS was 2.813 months for `feature_015="squamous"` versus 3.670 months for `feature_015="adenocarcinoma"`, a -0.8569 month difference (p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment for major prognostic features, patients with `feature_025="current"` have lower mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_025="never"`.
After adjustment for major prognostic features, patients with `feature_025="former"` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_025="never"`.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS with never as the reference level for feature_025.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_025="current"` remained adverse versus `feature_025="never"`: adjusted coefficient -0.5459 months (p<1e-300).

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS with never as the reference level for feature_025.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_025="former"` was not meaningfully different from `feature_025="never"`: adjusted coefficient +0.0057 months (p=0.603).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, higher `feature_004` is associated with lower mean `pfs_months`.
After adjustment, higher `feature_056` is associated with higher mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS main-effects model.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_004` remained independently adverse: -0.0732 months per unit (p<1e-300).

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS main-effects model.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_056` remained independently favorable: +0.4628 months per unit (p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, patients with `feature_010=1` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_010=0`.
After adjustment, patients with `feature_009=1` have higher mean `pfs_months` than patients with `feature_009=0`.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS main-effects model.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_010=1` was independently favorable: adjusted +0.8925 months (p<1e-300).

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS main-effects model.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_009=1` was independently favorable: adjusted +0.3229 months (p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The univariate adverse association for `feature_057=1` persists after adjustment for `feature_041`, `feature_036`, `feature_001`, `feature_042`, `feature_010`, `feature_009`, histology, and `feature_025`.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS main-effects model.
analyses.result_summary: The adjusted `feature_057` coefficient attenuated to -0.0278 months and was not significant at 0.05 (p=0.0684).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The univariate adverse association for `feature_028=1` persists after multivariable adjustment.
The univariate favorable association for `feature_066=1` persists after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS main-effects model.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_028=1` did not retain an independent adverse association: adjusted -0.0053 months (p=0.481).

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS main-effects model.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_066=1` did not retain an independent favorable association: adjusted -0.0004 months (p=0.967).

proposed_hypotheses.text: After adjustment, higher continuous `feature_051` is associated with slightly lower mean `pfs_months`.

analyses.method: Multivariable OLS main-effects model.
analyses.result_summary: `feature_051` had a small but significant adjusted adverse coefficient: -0.000446 months per unit (p<1e-300).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The favorable association of `feature_010=1` is stronger among patients with `feature_009=1` than among patients with `feature_009=0`.

analyses.method: Adjusted OLS adding centered `feature_010 * feature_009` interaction to the main-effects model.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_010 * feature_009` interaction was strongly positive: +2.5316 months (p<1e-300), indicating larger `feature_010` benefit when `feature_009=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The favorable association of `feature_010=1` is weaker among patients with `feature_037=1` than among patients with `feature_037=0`.

analyses.method: Adjusted OLS adding centered `feature_010 * feature_037` interaction to the main-effects model.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_010 * feature_037` interaction was strongly negative: -1.6082 months (p<1e-300), indicating attenuation or reversal of `feature_010` benefit when `feature_037=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The favorable association of `feature_009=1` is weaker among patients with `feature_037=1` than among patients with `feature_037=0`.

analyses.method: Adjusted OLS adding centered `feature_009 * feature_037` interaction to the main-effects model.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_009 * feature_037` interaction was negative: -0.5886 months (p<1e-300). In stratified means, `feature_009=1` added +0.571 months when `feature_037=0` but only +0.009 months when `feature_037=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The `feature_010=1` increase in mean `pfs_months` is concentrated in the subgroup with `feature_009=1` and `feature_037=0`, rather than applying uniformly across the four `feature_009` by `feature_037` strata.

analyses.method: Adjusted OLS with all two-way terms and a centered `feature_010 * feature_009 * feature_037` three-way interaction.
analyses.result_summary: The three-way interaction was strongly negative: -4.5787 months (p<1e-300), confirming that the two-way pattern changes by the third marker.

analyses.method: Stratified Welch comparison of feature_010 within feature_009=1 and feature_037=0.
analyses.result_summary: Within `feature_009=1` and `feature_037=0`, mean PFS was 7.876 months for `feature_010=1` versus 3.315 months for `feature_010=0`: +4.5613 months (p<1e-300).

analyses.method: Stratified Welch comparisons of feature_010 in the other feature_009/feature_037 strata.
analyses.result_summary: In the other strata, `feature_010=1` was slightly adverse: -0.102 months for `feature_009=0, feature_037=0` (p=0.0300), -0.143 months for `feature_009=0, feature_037=1` (p=0.00574), and -0.167 months for `feature_009=1, feature_037=1` (p=0.01897).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive slope of `feature_041` on `pfs_months` is weaker at higher values of `feature_036`.

analyses.method: Combined adjusted OLS interaction model with centered `feature_041 * feature_036`.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_041 * feature_036` interaction was negative: -0.01479 months per product unit (p<1e-300). Unadjusted `feature_041` slopes declined from +0.179 at `feature_036=0` to +0.170 at `feature_036=1` and +0.146 at `feature_036=2`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive slope of `feature_041` on `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `feature_001=1` than among patients with `feature_001=0`.

analyses.method: Combined adjusted OLS interaction model with centered `feature_041 * feature_001`.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_041 * feature_001` interaction was negative: -0.01346 months per product unit (p<1e-300). Stratified slopes were +0.1776 for `feature_001=0` and +0.1650 for `feature_001=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive slope of `feature_041` on `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `feature_042=1` than among patients with `feature_042=0`.

analyses.method: Combined adjusted OLS interaction model with centered `feature_041 * feature_042`.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_041 * feature_042` interaction was negative: -0.01398 months per product unit (p<1e-300). Stratified slopes were +0.1727 for `feature_042=0` and +0.1613 for `feature_042=1`.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive slope of `feature_041` on `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `feature_015="squamous"` than among patients with `feature_015="adenocarcinoma"`.

analyses.method: Combined adjusted OLS interaction model with centered `feature_041 * squamous`.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_041 * squamous` interaction was negative: -0.00983 months per product unit (p<1e-300). Stratified slopes were +0.1611 for squamous and +0.1729 for adenocarcinoma.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive slope of `feature_041` on `pfs_months` is weaker among patients with `feature_025="current"` than among patients who are not `feature_025="current"`.

analyses.method: Combined adjusted OLS interaction model with centered `feature_041 * current`.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_041 * current` interaction was negative: -0.00737 months per product unit (p<1e-300). Stratified slopes were +0.1636 for current and +0.1724 for not-current.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The favorable association of `feature_010=1` is weaker or reversed among patients with `feature_057=1` compared with patients with `feature_057=0`.

analyses.method: Combined adjusted OLS interaction model with centered `feature_010 * feature_057`.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_010 * feature_057` interaction was negative: -0.8459 months (p<1e-300).

analyses.method: Stratified Welch comparisons of feature_010 by feature_057.
analyses.result_summary: When `feature_057=0`, `feature_010=1` was associated with +0.8242 months (p<1e-300); when `feature_057=1`, it was associated with -0.3854 months (p=0.00790).

proposed_hypotheses.text: The adverse association of `feature_001=1` with `pfs_months` is weaker at higher values of `feature_036`.

analyses.method: Combined adjusted OLS interaction model with centered `feature_036 * feature_001`.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_036 * feature_001` interaction was positive: +0.0882 months (p<1e-300), indicating that the negative `feature_001` effect attenuates as `feature_036` increases.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The adverse association of `feature_042=1` with `pfs_months` is weaker among `feature_015="squamous"` patients than among `feature_015="adenocarcinoma"` patients.

analyses.method: Combined adjusted OLS interaction model with centered `feature_042 * squamous`.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_042 * squamous` interaction was positive: +0.1100 months (p<1e-300), indicating partial attenuation of the adverse `feature_042` association in squamous histology.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The adverse association of `feature_042=1` with `pfs_months` is weaker at higher values of `feature_036`.

analyses.method: Combined adjusted OLS interaction model with centered `feature_036 * feature_042`.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_036 * feature_042` interaction was positive: +0.0765 months (p<1e-300), indicating that the negative `feature_042` effect attenuates as `feature_036` increases.

proposed_hypotheses.text: After accounting for the strongest interaction cluster, the previously observed `feature_009 * feature_025="current"` interaction is no longer statistically significant.
After accounting for the strongest interaction cluster, the previously observed `feature_037 * feature_025="current"` interaction is no longer statistically significant.

analyses.method: Combined adjusted OLS model containing main effects and selected strong interactions.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_009 * current` term was small and non-significant after adding the dominant interaction cluster: +0.0061 months (p=0.552).

analyses.method: Combined adjusted OLS model containing main effects and selected strong interactions.
analyses.result_summary: The `feature_037 * current` term was small and non-significant after adding the dominant interaction cluster: -0.0113 months (p=0.250).
